title: HaywenCollection
description: This is a collections mod for use on the HaywenSMP modpacks. It has custom music, items and blocks.
body:
# Created using mcreator!
https://mcreator.net/

This is a collection mod for use on the Haywen SMP server and modpacks!

This mod should only be used - in conjunction with Haywen modpacks - or for use in showcase style content

Currently, it contains our custom music tracks and audio made by Itami Productions and Novixa
